nasb.text: So the overseer continued to withhold their choice food and the wine they were to drink, and kept giving them vegetables.

esv.text: So the steward took away their food and the wine they were to drink, and gave them vegetables.

cnv.text: 看管他們的人就撤去指定給他們享用的佳餚美酒，讓他們吃素菜。

ccb.text: 于是，监管撤去了安排给他们的膳食和酒，只给他们素菜。
